ditail.en: Delicious macaroni prepared with fresh ingredients, rich sauce, and a tasty flavor that makes every bite enjoyable.
ditail.am: በአዲስ ግብዓቶች፣ ጣፋጭ ሶስ እና ልዩ ጣዕም የተዘጋጀ ጣፋጭ ማካሮኒ።
ditail.om: Makaroonii mi'aawaa wantoota haaraa fi soosii mi'aawaan qophaa'e.
ditail.ti: ብሓደሽቲ ቀመማትን ጥዑም ሶስን ዝተዳለወ ጥዑም ማካሮኒ።

ditail.en: Fresh pasta cooked with delicious sauce and carefully selected ingredients for a satisfying meal.
ditail.am: በጣፋጭ ሶስ እና በተመረጡ ግብዓቶች የተዘጋጀ ጣፋጭ ፓስታ።
ditail.om: Paastaa haaraa soosii mi'aawaa fi wantoota filatamoo waliin qophaa'e.
ditail.ti: ብጥዑም ሶስን ዝተመረጹ ቀመማትን ዝተዳለወ ሓድሽ ፓስታ።

ditail.en: A juicy burger made with a soft bun, grilled meat, fresh vegetables, and special sauce.
ditail.am: ለስላሳ ዳቦ፣ የተጠበሰ ስጋ፣ ትኩስ አትክልቶች እና ልዩ ሶስ የተዘጋጀ ጣፋጭ በርገር።
ditail.om: Bargarii laafaa foon bilcheeffame, kuduraalee haaraa fi soosii addaa qabu.
ditail.ti: ብለስላሳ ባን፣ ዝተጠበሰ ስጋ፣ ሓደሽቲ ኣሕምልቲን ፍሉይ ሶስን ዝተዳለወ በርገር።

ditail.en: Fresh pizza topped with cheese, vegetables, and delicious toppings baked to perfection.
ditail.am: በቺዝ፣ በአትክልቶች እና በጣፋጭ ጨማሪ ምግቦች የተሞላ ትኩስ ፒዛ።
ditail.om: Piizaa haaraa chizii, kuduraalee fi wantoota mi'aawoo irratti dabalaman qabu.
ditail.ti: ብቺዝ፣ ኣሕምልቲን ጥዑማት ተወሰኽቲ ዝተሸፈነ ሓድሽ ፒዛ።
